LJCPersons.summary: Represents a strongly typed collection of objects. The unique key for an item is the combination of ParentID and Name.

DefaultCtor.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

CopyCtor.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class as a deep copy of the specified collection.
CopyCtor.exception: Thrown when the persons parameter is null.

Clone.summary: Creates a new object that is a deep copy of the current instance.
Clone.returns: A new object that is a deep copy of this instance.

Add.summary: Creates a new object with the specified details and adds it to the collection.
Add.param: The foreign key to the parent object.
The name (part of the unique key).
Add.returns: The newly created and added object.
Add.exception: Thrown if an item with the same ParentID and Name already exists.

AddObject.summary: Adds an existing object to the collection.
AddObject.exception: Thrown when the person parameter is null.
Thrown if an item with the same ParentID and Name already exists.

Remove.summary: Removes the first occurrence of a specific object with matching ParentID and Name from the collection.
Remove.param: The foreign key to the parent object.
The name of the person to remove.

Retrieve.summary: Searches for a object with matching ParentID and Name values.
Retrieve.param: The foreign key to the parent object.
Retrieve.returns: The matching object if found; otherwise, null.

ID.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier (database generated primary key).

ParentID.summary: Gets or sets the foreign key to the parent object.

Name.summary: Gets or sets the name (part of the unique key).

Description.summary: Gets or sets an optional description.
